feat.name: Vaulting Gallop
feat.text: You've trained your mount to vault over obstacles at high speeds. You Command an Animal to order your mount to Stride twice. During this movement, your mount can Leap over obstacles of its size and smaller as well as creatures up to its size, though it must end this movement on solid ground. Leaps taken as part of this activity do not provoke reactions.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
